headline: Why EPAM Systems (EPAM) Is Down After a 52-Week Low and Profit Slump – And What's Next
summary: EPAM Systems recently hit a new 52-week low of $110.95, capping a year in which its stock performance has lagged the S&P 500 and coincided with a 25.08% drop in net profit. This combination of weaker profitability and underperformance relative to the broader market has sharpened investor focus on whether EPAM’s current transformation efforts can offset recent earnings pressure. With net profit under strain, we’ll now examine how this weaker profitability backdrop affects EPAM’s AI-led,...
